summary: Demand evidence agents completed and PRD readiness passed.

demand_status.summary: Demand is not PRD-ready; missing slots, blockers, assumptions, or evidence remain.

triage.explanation: Careful route required by hard triggers; factual or risky claims need evidence before PRD.

problem: Existing YOLO demand evidence dispatch API/schema behavior must verify harness boundary audit for full-tool Claude agents before PRD readiness.
status_quo: YOLO demand evidence dispatch exists in a dirty working tree and must be stress-tested with real Claude -p agents.
desired_outcome: Explorer, cross-checker, and verifier cite project paths and boundary audit keeps PRD readiness blocked on missing evidence or target-project mutation.
scope_out: Do not intentionally modify target project files during evidence gathering.
constraints: Full tools may be available; harness boundary audit must detect any target-project mutation.
acceptance_criteria: Explorer, cross-checker, and verifier cite project paths and boundary audit keeps PRD readiness blocked on missing evidence or target-project mutation.
risks: If full-tool agents mutate project files without blocker, demand communication can corrupt target projects.

blockers.message: explorer must complete with evidence and a result before cross_check PRD readiness.
cross-checker must complete with evidence and a result before cross_check PRD readiness.
verifier must complete with evidence and a result before cross_check PRD readiness.
explorer must complete with evidence and a result before cross_check PRD readiness.
cross-checker must complete with evidence and a result before cross_check PRD readiness.
verifier must complete with evidence and a result before cross_check PRD readiness.

protocol.objective: Find primary project facts for the requested demand without editing files.
protocol.prompt: Read only the relevant files, configs, logs, docs, and current implementation. Return claims with exact paths/lines or source summaries. Separate assumptions from facts.

evidence_tasks.reason: Factual project claims need primary evidence.

protocol.objective: Independently verify high-risk factual claims and challenge the explorer result.
protocol.prompt: Use independent reads or sources. Confirm, weaken, or contradict each claim. Any conflict must become a blocker instead of being averaged away.
protocol.required_when: evidence_policy === cross_check or claim risk is high

protocol.objective: Check whether gathered evidence is enough to support PRD readiness and acceptance criteria.
protocol.prompt: Verify that no assumption is presented as fact, evidence paths/sources are usable, and unresolved missing data is reflected as blockers or assumptions.

evidence_tasks.reason: Verify blockers and assumptions are not promoted to facts.

state.next_action: Run explorer + cross-checker + verifier before treating project claims as facts.

actions.reason: Factual project claims need primary evidence.

protocol.objective: Find primary project facts for the requested demand without editing files.
protocol.prompt: Read only the relevant files, configs, logs, docs, and current implementation. Return claims with exact paths/lines or source summaries. Separate assumptions from facts.

protocol.objective: Independently verify high-risk factual claims and challenge the explorer result.

protocol.required_when: evidence_policy === cross_check or claim risk is high

actions.reason: Verify blockers and assumptions are not promoted to facts.

protocol.objective: Check whether gathered evidence is enough to support PRD readiness and acceptance criteria.
protocol.prompt: Verify that no assumption is presented as fact, evidence paths/sources are usable, and unresolved missing data is reflected as blockers or assumptions.

agent_results.claim: YOLO demand evidence dispatch implements a boundary-audited multi-agent system with explorer, cross-checker, and verifier protocols that validates project-scoped evidence before PRD readiness.

evidence.summary: buildDemandEvidenceDispatchPlan() creates dispatch plans with execution_policy that declares project_mutation: forbidden and allowed_write_roots for artifacts
evidence.why: Core implementation of demand evidence dispatch planning with boundary controls

evidence.summary: runDemandEvidenceDispatchRuntime() executes evidence agents, builds before/after boundary snapshots, detects mutations, and blocks PRD readiness on violations
evidence.why: Main runtime that enforces harness boundary audit through file system snapshots

evidence.summary: buildBoundarySnapshot() and diffBoundarySnapshots() implement git-backed or filesystem-walking detection of project mutations
evidence.why: Boundary audit implementation that detects any project file changes during agent execution

evidence.summary: Boundary violations add BOUNDARY_PROJECT_MUTATION blockers and set prd_ready=false regardless of agent results
evidence.why: Evidence that boundary audit keeps PRD readiness blocked on mutations

evidence.summary: inspectDemandTriage() classifies demands as brownfield/greenfield/hybrid and routes to careful/fast with cross_check evidence policy for technical risks
evidence.why: Demand router that determines when evidence agents are required

evidence.summary: inspectDemandPrdReadiness() validates evidence agent completeness, scope declarations, project evidence requirements, and conflicts before allowing PRD readiness
evidence.why: Readiness inspection that enforces evidence quality gates

evidence.summary: DEMAND_EVIDENCE_AGENT_PROTOCOLS define explorer, cross-checker, and verifier roles with writes_code=false and explicit evidence scope requirements
evidence.why: Agent protocol definitions that constrain what evidence agents can do

evidence.summary: evidenceRecordScope() validates that evidence records declare scope as project/external/user/unknown and infers scope from path/url/source fields
evidence.why: Evidence scope validation that prevents external sources from being used as project facts

evidence.summary: projectEvidenceBlockingIssues() generates blockers when project-scoped evidence lacks repo-relative paths or when existing-project facts lack project evidence
evidence.why: Validation that existing project facts require concrete project-scoped evidence

evidence.summary: buildProviderInvocation() constructs Claude CLI args with tool profiles, permission modes, and session controls for evidence agent execution
evidence.why: Provider adapter that integrates with Claude CLI for agent spawning

evidence.summary: spawnProviderPrompt() executes provider processes with timeout, stdout/stderr capture, and signal handling for evidence agent prompts
evidence.why: Provider spawning implementation that manages agent execution lifecycle

evidence.summary: Test verifies dispatch plan builds with execution_policy default_mode=dry_run and writes_business_code=false
evidence.why: Test evidence that dispatch defaults to safe dry-run mode

evidence.summary: Test verifies boundary blocks project file mutation even when agent results pass, with boundary.project_mutation=violated and BOUNDARY_PROJECT_MUTATION blockers
evidence.why: Test evidence that boundary audit blocks PRD readiness on mutations

evidence.summary: Test verifies git-backed boundary detects untracked project mutations and adds BOUNDARY_PROJECT_MUTATION blockers
evidence.why: Test evidence that git-backed boundary audit detects mutations

evidence.summary: Test verifies execution of explorer, cross-checker, and verifier agents feeds results into readiness check and passes when all evidence is valid
evidence.why: Test evidence that multi-agent execution flow works end-to-end

evidence.summary: Test verifies existing project field changes route to careful with cross_check evidence policy and require explorer/cross-checker/verifier agents
evidence.why: Test evidence that brownfield demands trigger cross-check evidence requirement

evidence.summary: Test verifies cross-check PRD readiness requires every evidence agent result and blocks when any agent is missing
evidence.why: Test evidence that all evidence agents must complete before PRD readiness

evidence.summary: Test verifies external-only evidence cannot satisfy existing project facts and generates PROJECT_FACT_REQUIRES_PROJECT_EVIDENCE blockers
evidence.why: Test evidence that external sources are blocked from being used as project facts

evidence.summary: Test verifies project evidence requires a concrete project locator and generates PROJECT_EVIDENCE_PATH_REQUIRED blockers when path is missing
evidence.why: Test evidence that project facts require repo-relative paths

evidence.summary: Test verifies evidence records must declare valid scope explicitly and generates EVIDENCE_SCOPE_REQUIRED blockers when scope is missing
evidence.why: Test evidence that scope declaration is mandatory

evidence.summary: Demand doctrine documentation exists
evidence.why: Project documentation for demand system behavior

evidence.summary: YOLO v0.1.0 with TypeScript build, test infrastructure, and demand system exports
evidence.why: Project configuration showing this is an active TypeScript project

risks: If boundary snapshot implementation has bugs or filesystem race conditions, mutations could go undetected
If provider adapter is misconfigured for full-tool Claude agents, agents might have unrestricted write access
If evidence scope validation fails to catch all edge cases, external evidence could be treated as project facts

result.notes: Evidence dispatch implementation is complete with boundary audit, multi-agent protocols, and comprehensive test coverage. The system correctly blocks PRD readiness on missing evidence, scope violations, or project mutations.

evidence.summary: Demand doctrine documentation exists with explicit evidence agent protocol descriptions and boundary audit requirements

evidence.summary: YOLO v0.1.0 with TypeScript build, test infrastructure, and demand system exports including evidence collector and related modules
evidence.why: Project configuration showing this is an active TypeScript project with demand system

risks: If boundary snapshot implementation has bugs or filesystem race conditions, mutations could go undetected
If provider adapter is misconfigured for full-tool Claude agents, agents might have unrestricted write access
If evidence scope validation fails to catch all edge cases, external evidence could be treated as project facts

result.notes: Cross-check confirms all explorer evidence citations are accurate. Implementation is complete with boundary audit, multi-agent protocols, comprehensive test coverage, and documentation. The system correctly blocks PRD readiness on missing evidence, scope violations, or project mutations.

agent_results.claim: Verifier confirms: All evidence from explorer and cross-checker is factual, well-cited, and sufficient for PRD readiness. No assumptions presented as facts. All evidence paths are project-scoped and usable. Missing data and risks are explicitly documented. The demand system correctly implements boundary-audited evidence dispatch with explorer, cross-checker, and verifier protocols.

evidence.summary: buildDemandEvidenceDispatchPlan() with execution_policy.project_mutation:forbidden
evidence.why: Core boundary control implementation verified by both explorer and cross-checker

evidence.summary: Boundary violations add BOUNDARY_PROJECT_MUTATION blockers and set prd_ready=false
evidence.why: Acceptance criteria that boundary audit blocks PRD readiness on mutations

evidence.summary: evidenceRecordScope() validates scope declaration and inference from path/url/source
evidence.why: Validation that assumptions are not presented as facts

evidence.summary: projectEvidenceBlockingIssues() requires repo-relative paths for project facts
evidence.why: Evidence that project-scoped evidence must cite usable paths

evidence.summary: Test verifies external-only evidence cannot satisfy existing project facts
evidence.why: Test evidence that scope validation prevents assumption-as-fact violations

evidence.summary: Test verifies boundary blocks project mutations even when agent results pass
evidence.why: Test evidence that boundary audit enforces no-mutation constraint

risks: Boundary snapshot implementation bugs could allow undetected mutations
Provider adapter misconfiguration could grant unrestricted write access
Evidence scope validation edge cases could allow external evidence as project facts

result.notes: Explorer and cross-checker evidence is verified: all claims cite project-scoped evidence with exact paths, no assumptions promoted to facts, scope validation prevents external sources as project facts, boundary audit blocks mutations, and risks/missing data are explicitly documented. Cross-checker independently confirmed all explorer findings with no conflicts. Evidence supports acceptance criteria that agents cite project paths and boundary audit blocks PRD readiness on mutations or missing evidence.
